merged.Description: This recall involves the T4E (Training for Engagement) TR50 Air Pistol. It is CO2 powered, holds six .50 caliber rounds and is made of black plastic polymer. The air pistol is a recreational and training product that shoots rubber, plastic or powder ball (non-lethal) ammunition. It is the size of a standard revolver and measures about nine inches long. The model numbers affected by this recall are 2292112, 2280182 and 2280199. The T4E logo and "TR50" are engraved on the left-hand side of the muzzle. The serial number is engraved on the right-hand side of the muzzle.
merged.Title: Umarex USA Recalls T4E TR50 Air Pistols Due to Impact Hazard
merged.ConsumerContact: Umarex toll-free at 877-212-1036 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, email at service@umarex.com, or online at http://t4eguns.com/recall or https://www.t4eguns.com/ and click on "Recall" at the bottom of the page for more information.

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 30 reports of the CO2 cartridge unintentionally ejecting with force, including seven reports of injury, such as fractured hands, broken fingers and contusions.

Retailers.Name: Big 5 stores in the Western United States, Modern Combat Sports in Vista, California, and online at https://mcsus.com, Amazon.com and Valken.com from May 2022 through July 2023 for about $110.

Importers.Name: Umarex USA, of Fort Smith, Arkansas

Hazards.Name: The CO2 cartridge can be unintentionally ejected with force from the handle, posing an impact hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled air pistols and contact Umarex to register for a free replacement air pistol and free shipping to return the recalled product.

csv.Recall Heading: Umarex USA Recalls T4E TR50 Air Pistols Due to Impact Hazard
csv.Description: This recall involves the T4E (Training for Engagement) TR50 Air Pistol. It is CO2 powered, holds six .50 caliber rounds and is made of black plastic polymer. The air pistol is a recreational and training product that shoots rubber, plastic or powder ball (non-lethal) ammunition. It is the size of a standard revolver and measures about nine inches long. The model numbers affected by this recall are 2292112, 2280182 and 2280199 with the following serial numbers: 22D226941 - 23C087042. The T4E logo and “TR50” are engraved on the left-hand side of the muzzle. Serial numbers 22D00001-23C087042 are included in this recall. The serial number is engraved on the right-hand side of the muzzle.
csv.Hazard Description: The CO2 cartridge can be unintentionally ejected with force from the handle, posing an impact hazard.
csv.Incidents: The firm has received 30 reports of the CO2 cartridge unintentionally ejecting with force, including seven reports of injury, such as fractured hands, broken fingers and contusions.
csv.Remedy: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled air pistols and contact Umarex to register for a free replacement air pistol and free shipping to return the recalled product.
csv.Sold At: Big 5 stores in the Western United States, Modern Combat Sports in Vista, California, and online at https://mcsus.com/, Amazon.com and Valken.com from May 2022 through July 2023 for about $110.
csv.Importers: Umarex USA, of Fort Smith, Arkansas

merged.Description: This recall involves Crosman Icon .177 and .22 Caliber Air Rifles. The rifles are PCP-Powered Bolt-Actioned air rifles with model numbers CPI77S and CPI22S. Model numbers are on the left-hand side of the rifle. The name of the model is on the right-hand side of the rifle.
merged.Title: Crosman Recalls Icon Air Rifles Due to Injury Hazard
merged.ConsumerContact: Crosman at 800-724-7486 from 9 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, online at www.crosman.com/iconrecall or www.crosman.com click on "Recall" at the top of the page for more information, or email iconrecall@crosman.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Crosman Icon .177 Caliber Air Rifle (CPI77S)
Recalled Crosman Icon .22 Caliber Air Rifle (CPI22S)
Recalled Crosman Model Number location on air rifle
The name of the model "icon" on the right-hand side of the rifle

Injuries.Name: The firm has received one report of an unintended discharge. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Do It Best Hardware, True Value, Service star and Sportsman's Guide stores nationwide, or online at www.Crosman.com, www.pyramydair.com and www.Amazon.com from March 2022 through March 2024 for about $310.

Importers.Name: Crosman Corp., of Bloomfield, New York

Hazards.Name: An uncocked and loaded air rifle can discharge unexpectedly if jolted or dropped, posing an injury hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled air rifles and contact Crosman to receive a refund in the form of a Crosman store credit or a refund check after returning the air rifle. Crosman will mail a box with instructions and prepaid postage to each consumer who registers at www.crosman.com/iconrecall. Crosman is contacting all known purchasers.

merged.Description: This recall involves eight Ravin R500 models of crossbows. The R500 series crossbows are about 8 inches wide, axle-to-axle un-cocked, and about 28 inches from end to end. All models have a split limb arrangement with cams mounted between the upper and lower limbs. R500 series crossbows were sold in slate gray and camo colors. All the crossbows include a scope, quiver, cocking handle, quiver bracket and 6 arrows. The Ravin logo and model names are on a decal located on both upper limbs. The serial number is on the left side of the rail above the trigger. Product Name Model Ravin R500 R050 Ravin R500 Sniper R051 Ravin R500E R052 Ravin R500E Sniper R053 Ravin R500 XK7 R054 Ravin R500 Sniper XK7 R055 Ravin R500E XK7 R056 Ravin R500E Sniper XK7 R057.
merged.Title: Ravin Crossbows Recalls Ravin R500 Series Crossbows Due to Injury Hazard
merged.ConsumerContact: Ravin Crossbows toll-free at 888-298-6335 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, email at R500recall@ravincrossbows.com, or online at https://www.ravincrossbows.com/r500recall or www.ravincrossbows.com and click on "Safety & Instruction" then "Recall Notices" for more information.

Products.Name: Ravin R500 Model Crossbows
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 13,300 (In addition, about 425 were sold in Canada)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received one report of the crossbow unexpectedly discharging. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Ravin Crossbows LLC, of Superior, Wisconsin

Retailers.Name: Ravin, Bass Pro Shops, Cabela's, Dick's Sporting Goods stores and other stores nationwide, and online at www.ravincrossbows.com from September 2021 through October 2023 for between $2,550 and $4,025.

Hazards.Name: If nearly but not fully cocked, the crossbow can discharge unexpectedly while consumers cock or uncock the crossbow, posing an injury hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled Ravin R500 series crossbows and contact Ravin Crossbows for a free repair.
